creator: jyyou@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
On Mon, Oct 17, 2011 at 9:21 AM, Steve Wills <swills@freebsd.org> wrote:
 > Also, would like you to consider changing maintainer on this to ruby@
 > which will make updating this along with the rest of the rubygem-dm-*
 > ports easier.
 
 It's fine to change maintainer to ruby@.
 
 dm-do-adapter depends on data_objects>=0.10.6 and dm-core>=1.2.0.
 The RUN_DEPENDS should be updated.
 databases/rubygem-datamapper and databases/rubygem-dm-* need to be
 updated to 1.2.0.
 
 Thanks
